cases.description: Validate Preview3 treats a connection as a multi-session container by allowing multiple live session_ids without cross-session state or credit leakage.
Validate closing one Preview3 session does not implicitly close the transport or invalidate sibling sessions that remain active on the same connection.
Validate connection-level CLOSE tears down remaining Preview3 sessions as a container shutdown, rather than reusing per-session close semantics or permitting further session traffic.
